name: auto insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/month tool
description: For auto insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/month, inefficient claims submission causes delays in claim resolution. We streamline the submission process instead of manual submission via email and paper forms.
problem_solved: Inefficient claims submission process leading to delays.
